inputs.label: Wall Width
inputs.businessContext: The horizontal length of the wall to cover.

businessContext_i18n.en: The horizontal length of the wall to cover.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die horizontale Länge der zu bedeckenden Wand.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur horizontale du mur à couvrir.

inputs.label: Wall Height
inputs.businessContext: The vertical height of the wall.

businessContext_i18n.en: The vertical height of the wall.

inputs.label: Exposed Face
inputs.businessContext: The visible height of each siding board after overlapping, typically 4-8 inches.

businessContext_i18n.en: The visible height of each siding board after overlapping, typically 4-8 inches.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her bir cephe kaplama levhasının bindirmeden sonra görünen yüksekliği, tipik olarak 4-8 inç.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die sichtbare Höhe jeder Verkleidungsplatte nach Überlappung, typischerweise 4-8 Zoll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur visible de chaque planche de bardage après recouvrement, généralement 4 à 8 pouces.

inputs.label: Board Length
inputs.businessContext: The length of each siding board.

businessContext_i18n.en: The length of each siding board.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her bir cephe kaplama levhasının uzunluğu.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur de chaque planche de bardage.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Extra material percentage to account for cuts and errors.

businessContext_i18n.en: Extra material percentage to account for cuts and errors.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesim ve hatalar için ekstra malzeme yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher Materialanteil für Schnitte und Fehler.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de matière supplémentaire pour tenir compte des coupes et des erreurs.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
